description: A collection of mathematical utility nodes
author: NodeCanvas

nodes.name: Clamp
nodes.description: Clamps a number between min and max values

nodes.name: Lerp
nodes.code:
def process(a, b, t):
    a_val = a if a is not None else 0.0
    b_val = b if b is not None else 1.0
    t_val = t if t is not None else 0.5
    return a_val + (b_val - a_val) * t_val

nodes.name: Abs
nodes.description: Returns the absolute value of a number
nodes.code:
def process(value):
    return abs(value) if value is not None else 0.0

nodes.name: Power
nodes.description: Raises a number to a power
nodes.code:
def process(base, exponent):
    b = base if base is not None else 0.0
    e = exponent if exponent is not None else 2.0
    return b ** e

nodes.name: SquareRoot
nodes.description: Returns the square root of a number

nodes.name: Round
nodes.description: Rounds a number to specified decimal places
